◎译　　名　当暴风雨退去
◎片　　名　When The Storm Fades
◎年　　代　2018
◎产　　地　加拿大
◎类　　别　剧情 / 喜剧
◎语　　言　英语
◎上映日期　2018-10-04(温哥华国际电影节) / 2020-10-13(美国)

　　　　　  阿隆·里德 Aaron Read


◎简　　介  

　　A genre defying docudramedy starring a real Filipino family of typhoon survivors re-enacting their daily struggle to recover from the strongest storm in recorded history - 2013's Super Typhoon Haiyan. Three years after the storm, the Pablos have rebuilt their seaside home in Tacloban, one of the Philippines' poorest neighbourhoods. Their slow recovery is shaken up by two awkwar...
